industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Padaeng Industry Public Company Limited
summary: Padaeng Industry Public Company Limited engages in the renewable energy and other businesses in Thailand and internationally. The company produces and distributes electricity from 7 solar farms located in Thailand and 2 solar farms located in Japan with the total electricity generating capacity of 50 megawatts. It also offers property services; and trades in various base metals and by-products. In addition, the company is involved in the hotel and real estate activities. Padaeng Industry Public Company Limited was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
